mission.title: strimzi: kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups"
mission.description: kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups". This issue affects 2+ users.

steps.title: Identify strimzi troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your strimzi deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n strimzi --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review strimzi configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant strimzi configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi
kubectl get configmap -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=strimzi
```
My Kafka exporter can't connect to the broker and can't describe groups. So I have **missing metrics** in my prometheus instance.

steps.title: Apply the fix for kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups"
steps.description:
This PR updates the Kafka Exporter to a custom version based on the upstream 1.3.1. 

This should fix several issues reported with it: closes #4561 and Closes #2480.
```yaml
time="2020-01-30T11:22:53Z" level=error msg="Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected" source="kafka_exporter.go:373"
```

steps.title: Upgrade strimzi to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade strimzi:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade strimzi strimzi/strimzi --namespace strimzi
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n strimzi
helm list -n strimzi
```

steps.title: Confirm kafka-exporter "Cannot get describe groups" is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n strimzi --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n strimzi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This PR updates the Kafka Exporter to a custom version based on the upstream 1.3.1. 

This should fix several issues reported with it: closes #4561 and Closes #2480.
codeSnippets: time="2020-01-30T11:22:53Z" level=error msg="Cannot get describe groups: kafka: broker not connected" source="kafka_exporter.go:373"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with strimzi installed or the issue environment reproducible.
